close_reason: Fixed: doc comment now says InvalidUri
description: The doc-comment on algorithm() (line 458) says 'Returns SecretError::Backend if called on an NV-mode URI' but the actual code returns SecretError::InvalidUri. This is a doc/code mismatch. The InvalidUri variant is arguably more correct (the URI is wrong for this operation), so the fix is updating the doc-comment.
title: doc comment on algorithm() says Backend, code returns InvalidUri
